message:
test(bd-vhgs): add middleware trait and Arc delegation tests

Cover MiddlewareDecision Debug/Clone, default on_request/on_response/on_error
pass-through, custom short-circuit and error rewriting middleware, and
Arc<dyn Middleware> delegation for all three hooks (0 → 11 tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
